data.description: The improving U.S. fiscal situation and robust economic growth are bolstering the dollar’s reserve currency position, Miran says.
Early gains in S&P 500 E-minis reversed, leaving the index down 0.1%; Nasdaq futures declined 0.2%.

data.title: GreenPower Motor Company reports $8.5M revenue and $4.2M net income for Q3. Leading electric vehicle manufacturer.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 12, 2026, GreenPower Motor Company Inc. (Nasdaq: GP) announced its position as a prominent producer and supplier of all-electric, custom-made, zero-emission vehicles for medium and heavy-duty use in cargo and delivery sectors, as well as shuttle services.
S.Korea Finmin: Rising volatility in the crypto market expected to have limited impact on financial markets
S.Korea Finmin: To monitor bond markets more closely and review supply-demand conditions

SoftBank Group Corp - PayPay will remain a subsidiary of SoftBank following the completion of the public listing
SoftBank Group Corp - The exact timing, number of shares, and pricing for the proposed offering have not yet been finalized
SoftBank Group Corp - PayPay has filed a registration statement on Form F-1 for its proposed initial public offering

data.title: Align Partners proposes shareholder proposals to Gabia for strengthening governance practices at upcoming 27th AGM.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, Align Partners Capital Management Inc. has submitted formal shareholder proposals for the 27th Annual General Meeting of Gabia, Inc. They are calling for improved governance practices to tackle the Company's consistent undervaluation. With the upcoming AGM, Align Partners emphasizes the importance of addressing this issue.
The Nikkei share average slipped 1.2%.
There has been no substantial impact of tariffs on inflation, Miran reports.
The natural rate of unemployment is expected to be about 4%, Miran says.
Japan trade minister Akazawa: Acknowledged tough talks and uncertainty on timing for project finalization
Japan trade minister Akazawa: Noted progress in negotiations despite remaining gaps toward agreement
Japan trade minister Akazawa: Aims to strengthen Japan-U.S. economic ties ahead of Takaichi’s upcoming US visit

data.title: Twilio's Q4 earnings and revenue beat estimates, stock fell despite sales outlook above views.
data.description: Twilio experienced a drop in its stock value following the release of its Q4 earnings report, despite surpassing revenue and earnings estimates. The company also provided a sales forecast for the March quarter that exceeded expectations. The post-earnings announcement caused the software stock to decline.

data.title: Weyerhaeuser Co. (NYSE: WY) declares $0.21 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 20, 2026.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) revealed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly base cash dividend of $0.21 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be disbursed on March 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of a specified date.
The Kospi index in South Korea gained 0.4% at the open in Seoul.
The Federal Trade Commission’s 2024 merger disclosure requirement has been struck down by a U.S. court.
